description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is surrounded by a combination of wooden and stone fencing, with lush landscaping including palm trees and tall, slender shrubs. The property features a paved driveway leading to a covered carport and a gated entrance, with a white car parked in front. The main building is constructed from light-colored stone or concrete, and the outdoor areas include a green lawn and paved walkways. The windows are large and arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with stone walls, wooden fencing, lush landscaping, and a paved driveway with a carport. The property features large asymmetrical windows and a gated entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a white car parked outside, with lush landscaping and a gated fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, tall shrubs along the fence, and the flat roof structure with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the wooden fence, green lawn, and palm trees, with the carport and driveway partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, pool area, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the wooden fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and front windows
